name: Swift Fund Loans
description_short: Online loan marketplace connecting borrowers to a lender network offering $1,000–$5,000 personal loans with real-time matching and next-business-day funding.
description_long:
Swift Fund Loans (operating as qlofor.com) is an online loan matching service that acts as an intermediary between borrowers and a network of lenders. The platform does not originate loans itself but instead collects applicant information and routes requests to multiple lenders simultaneously for real-time decision-making. Founded to streamline the personal loan application process, the company targets consumers seeking quick access to modest loan amounts for various financial needs.

The platform offers personal loans ranging from $1,000 to $5,000 through a simple three-step process: a two-minute online form collecting identity, employment, and income information; real-time lender matching across their network; and e-signature completion with funds typically deposited within 24–48 hours. The service accepts all credit types and emphasizes speed and convenience as core value propositions. Loan terms vary significantly depending on which lender accepts the applicant and their creditworthiness.

Swift Fund Loans distinguishes itself through real-time lender matching rather than a single fixed underwriting decision, claiming this increases approval odds by exposing requests to multiple lenders simultaneously. The platform uses industry-standard encryption for data security and does not require collateral. Their website is transparent about APR variability, showing representative examples ranging from 28% to 600% depending on loan amount and term, though actual rates depend on individual lender decisions and borrower profiles.

The service functions purely as a marketplace facilitator rather than a direct lender, which creates both advantages and risks. While this approach can increase approval odds for marginal borrowers, consumers are redirected to third-party lender terms they have no control over. The APR examples cited on their site—particularly the 600% example for a 90-day $300 loan—represent extremely high-cost credit that borders on predatory lending territory. Borrowers must carefully evaluate offers before acceptance, as terms are determined by the matched lender, not Swift Fund Loans.
address: 106 S Tejon St Downtown Suite 13, Colorado Springs, CO 80903

company_info.headquarters: 106 S Tejon St Downtown Suite 13, Colorado Springs, CO 80903

pros: Two-minute application form with minimal documentation requirements
Real-time lender network matching potentially increasing approval odds
Funds deposited within 24–48 hours if approved by matched lender
Accepts all credit types including poor and no-credit applicants
Transparent about APR variability with representative examples provided
Industry-standard encryption for personal data protection
cons: APR examples range up to 600% annually, representing extremely high-cost credit unsuitable for most borrowers
No control over final loan terms—consumers are redirected to third-party lender agreements
Acts as middleman only; cannot modify or negotiate terms on behalf of borrowers
Actual approval and funding depend entirely on third-party lender decisions, not guaranteed
Loan amounts ($1,000–$5,000 floor) may exceed emergency needs for lowest-income borrowers
best_for: Borrowers with fair-to-poor credit seeking fast personal loans with minimal application friction
Consumers facing urgent financial needs who prioritize speed over shopping for lowest rates
Applicants wanting simultaneous consideration by multiple lenders to maximize approval chances
Those willing to accept higher APRs in exchange for rapid next-day funding
diagnosis: Swift Fund Loans is a lender marketplace best suited for borrowers with credit challenges who prioritize speed and convenience over shopping for competitive rates. The critical caveat is that representative APRs reach 600% annually—borrowers must carefully evaluate actual terms before accepting any offer, as rates at this level represent emergency-only high-cost credit with significant repayment risk.
services: Online personal loan marketplace and lender matching
Real-time lender network searching based on borrower profile
All credit types accepted (poor, fair, good, excellent)
Unsecured personal loans without collateral requirement
Disclosure documents (Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, Credit Authorization, Disclaimer)
Customer support through Sandra chatbot interface
